name: Tight-Tone-Tan Promotion
description: Our Tight • Toned • Tan promotional package combines three advanced therapies designed to support body composition, skin quality, recovery, and overall appearance from the inside out.
indication:
This protocol includes: Retatrutide, 5-Amina-1MQ,and GHK-CU. Retatrutide is a peptide therapy designed to support weight management and metabolic health by regulating appetite, blood sugar, and energy expenditure.
                      As a “triple agonist,” it activates GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors, offering a more comprehensive approach than traditional weight-loss therapies.
                      It may also help preserve lean muscle mass when combined with adequate protein intake and resistance training.
                      5-Amino-1MQ is a peptide compound being studied for its ability to support fat metabolism, energy production, and body recomposition by inhibiting the NNMT enzyme, which is linked to fat storage and metabolic efficiency.
                      It may help promote a leaner body composition, reduce stubborn fat, improve muscle definition, and support energy levels, making it a common addition to weight management and metabolic optimization protocols.
                      GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper peptide studied for its regenerative, skin, and hair-supportive properties. It may support collagen production, tissue repair, skin firmness and texture, wound healing, antioxidant activity, and overall skin and scalp health.
